basic_details.short_information: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya College (DDUC) Counselor Notification 2026 has been released on 03 June 2026 on the official website dducollegedu.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DDUC Counselor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Clinical Psychology/Counselling Psychology with 1 Year Experience OR Master's degree in Clinical Psychology with 6 Years Experience OR Master's degree in Psychology and Diploma in Mental and/or Social Psychology with 6 Years Experience.
qualification.details: Counselor: Essential: Ph.D. in Clinical Psychology/Counselling Psychology in First Class with One (01) Year of relevant experience in an educational institution OR Master's degree in Clinical Psychology with relevant experience of six years after obtaining the qualifying degree of which at least three years should be counseling experience in an academic/medical institution OR Master's degree in Psychology and diploma in Mental and/or Social Psychology with six years relevant experience after the diploma, of which at least three years should be counseling experience in an academic/medical institutions. Desirable: Extensive experience in administering different types of psychological tests, both online and offline; Awareness of and access to the relevant software for patient record-keeping; Excellent communication skills and interpretation skills in a multi-lingual setting; Administrative experience in establishing and managing Counseling services & experience in counseling students aged 18-30 Yrs; Experience in counseling students at highly competitive residential Institutes of higher learning; Relevant experience is defined as counseling experience in both group counseling and individual counseling in an educational institution or in a mental health-care clinic. Counselling agency/Companies are also eligible to apply.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DDUC Counselor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://dducollegedu.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DDUC Counselor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DDUC Counselor position is 29th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the college before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Ph.D. in Clinical Psychology/Counselling Psychology with 1 year of experience, or a Master's in Clinical Psychology with 6 years of experience, or a Master's in Psychology with a diploma and 6 years of experience. Specific details are in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Counselor post at Deen Dayal Upadhyaya College.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Counselor position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Counselor post is 55 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Counselor role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Counselor position is Rs. 3000 per visit.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the DDUC Counselor recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DDUC Counselor recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the official address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Document Verification followed by an Interaction.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Deen Dayal Upadhyaya College, and links are provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Counselor position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Counselor position at DDUC is Part Time.
